CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Set For Trial On May-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-02-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.

Michael R. Sullivan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Oliver Henderson dba Henderson Construction, and with Kenneth Henderson (son).
Fayedine Coulter, Esq. for and with Defendant Zolili Ndlili.
Case settled, terms on the record as follows:
Settlement in the amount of $42,500.00 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 06-23-11. If defendant failed, plaintiff shall have judgment enter for the same amount plus attorney's fees. Plaintiff agreed to have the filed mechanic lien release forth with. Parties agreed to terms in open court. Matter is deemed settled, trial is vacated.
Matter is schedule on the CRC dismissal calendar in Dept. 610 on Aug. 2, 2011 at 10: 00 a.m.

Tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF OLIVER HENDERSON'S Motion To Compel Compliance By Defendant To Produce Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $265, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (610/EAH)
